agent_outputs.raw: Selective-prediction systems should be evaluated on accepted cases plus coverage, not on the full ticket distribution. The pre-registered threshold is the design specification that makes this evaluation valid rather than cherry-picked. Both pre-specified targets were met on untouched test data. The claim is appropriately scoped to the selective system. Defense wins. VERDICT: defense_wins

The evaluation answers the right question: does this abstaining system safely automate a meaningful fraction of tickets? The harmful-error rate on auto-resolved tickets and the coverage metric together answer this. The pre-registration anchors the threshold prospectively. The untouched test set confirms the targets. A critic who insists every ticket must be scored by the model is applying the wrong frame — this is a system that intentionally routes uncertain cases to humans, and the evaluation treats it correctly as such. VERDICT: defense_wins

No methodological issue. The design follows the correct selective-prediction evaluation protocol: pre-specify operating requirements, train and calibrate on development data, freeze model, evaluate once on held-out data. The reported metrics match the product's design claims. The higher abstention rate is not a hidden problem — it is reported and reflects the conservative automation policy deliberately built into the system. VERDICT: defense_wins

synthesis: All three assessors converge on defense wins. The pre-registered threshold, two-part metric (performance + coverage), untouched test set, and correctly scoped claims are each confirmed by all assessors. ETD constraint: unanimous defense wins verdict. No dissenting view, no anomaly.
all_issues_raised: selective metric reporting — resolved by pre-registration and coverage disclosure

empirical_test.condition: Verify pre-registration predates training; confirm test set meets 1% harmful-error ceiling and 30% coverage floor
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Threshold tuned after test inspection, or either target not met
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Pre-registration predates training; untouched test meets both targets
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Coverage just barely meets floor with no margin; calibration audit incomplete
